'''âw-n-h''' ('''wanaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultraminiaturize|ultraminiaturize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultraminiaturize|ultraminiaturize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-n-h
|-
! Lemma
| wanaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wanahithi|wanahithi]] || [[word:wanahiji|wanahiji]] || [[word:wanahishi|wanahishi]] || [[word:wanahi|wanahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanahuthuth|wanahuthuth]] || [[word:wanahujuj|wanahujuj]] || [[word:wanahushush|wanahushush]] || [[word:wanah|wanah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanahuthu|wanahuthu]] || [[word:wanahuju|wanahuju]] || [[word:wanahushu|wanahushu]] || [[word:wanahu|wanahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanahufuth|wanahufuth]] || [[word:wanahufuj|wanahufuj]] || [[word:wanahufush|wanahufush]] || [[word:wanahuf|wanahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wanahethe|wanahethe]] || [[word:wanaheje|wanaheje]] || [[word:wanaheshe|wanaheshe]] || [[word:wanahe|wanahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanahothoth|wanahothoth]] || [[word:wanahojoj|wanahojoj]] || [[word:wanahoshosh|wanahoshosh]] || [[word:wanah|wanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanahotho|wanahotho]] || [[word:wanahojo|wanahojo]] || [[word:wanahosho|wanahosho]] || [[word:wanaho|wanaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanahofoth|wanahofoth]] || [[word:wanahofoj|wanahofoj]] || [[word:wanahofosh|wanahofosh]] || [[word:wanahof|wanahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wanahĂŠthĂŠ|wanahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wanahĂŠjĂŠ|wanahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wanahĂŠshĂŠ|wanahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wanahĂŠ|wanahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanahathath|wanahathath]] || [[word:wanahajaj|wanahajaj]] || [[word:wanahashash|wanahashash]] || [[word:wanah|wanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanahatha|wanahatha]] || [[word:wanahaja|wanahaja]] || [[word:wanahasha|wanahasha]] || [[word:wanaha|wanaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanahafath|wanahafath]] || [[word:wanahafaj|wanahafaj]] || [[word:wanahafash|wanahafash]] || [[word:wanahaf|wanahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wanahasha|wanahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowanahasha|gowanahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwanahasha|gokiwanahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wanahnĂŒsha|wanahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowanahnknĂŒsha|gowanahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwanahnĂŒsha|gokiwanahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wanahshĂ«sha|wanahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowanahnkshĂ«sha|gowanahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwanahshĂ«sha|gokiwanahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wanahrosha|wanahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowanahnkrosha|gowanahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwanahrosha|gokiwanahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wanahmusha|wanahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanahnkmusha|gowanahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanahmusha|gokiwanahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wanahsherasha|wanahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowanahnksherasha|gowanahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwanahsherasha|gokiwanahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wanahngasha|wanahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowanahnkngasha|gowanahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwanahngasha|gokiwanahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wanahyasha|wanahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowanahnkyasha|gowanahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwanahyasha|gokiwanahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wanahyamasha|wanahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowanahnkyamasha|gowanahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwanahyamasha|gokiwanahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wanahnĂŒshĂ«sha|wanahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowanahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gowanahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwanahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiwanahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wanahnĂŒrosha|wanahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowanahnknĂŒrosha|gowanahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwanahnĂŒrosha|gokiwanahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wanahnĂŒmusha|wanahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanahnknĂŒmusha|gowanahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanahnĂŒmusha|gokiwanahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wanahshĂ«nĂŒsha|wanahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowanahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gowanahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwanahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiwanahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wanahshĂ«rosha|wanahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowanahnkshĂ«rosha|gowanahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwanahshĂ«rosha|gokiwanahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wanahshĂ«musha|wanahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanahnkshĂ«musha|gowanahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanahshĂ«musha|gokiwanahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wanahronĂŒsha|wanahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowanahnkronĂŒsha|gowanahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwanahronĂŒsha|gokiwanahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wanahroshĂ«sha|wanahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowanahnkroshĂ«sha|gowanahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwanahroshĂ«sha|gokiwanahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wanahromusha|wanahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanahnkromusha|gowanahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanahromusha|gokiwanahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wanahmunĂŒsha|wanahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowanahnkmunĂŒsha|gowanahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwanahmunĂŒsha|gokiwanahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wanahmushĂ«sha|wanahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowanahnkmushĂ«sha|gowanahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwanahmushĂ«sha|gokiwanahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wanahmurosha|wanahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowanahnkmurosha|gowanahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwanahmurosha|gokiwanahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wanah|wanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠh|wĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howanah|howanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howĂŠnĂŠh|howĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowanah|hohowanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowĂŠnĂŠh|hohowĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒwanah|nĂŒwanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒwĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŒwĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwanah|nĂŒnĂŒwanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻwanah|nĂŻwanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻwĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŻwĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwanah|nĂŻnĂŻwanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwanah|luwanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwĂŠnĂŠh|luwĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwanah|luluwanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwĂŠnĂŠh|luluwĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwanah|liwanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwĂŠnĂŠh|liwĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwanah|liliwanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwĂŠnĂŠh|liliwĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowanah|kowanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowĂŠnĂŠh|kowĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowanah|kokowanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowĂŠnĂŠh|kokowĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewanah|kewanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewĂŠnĂŠh|kewĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewanah|kekewanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewĂŠnĂŠh|kekewĂŠnĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
